title: Add deterministic eval verification pipeline with performance gates
summary: Implemented a repeatable eval verification runner that tests scenario outcomes, attribution logic, profile aggregation, and latency, with non-zero exit on gate failure.
changes: Added eval verification script with isolated temp DB and scenario fixtures.
Added scenario gates for pass/partial/fail status and fault attribution checks.
Added profile aggregation and latency target gates.
Added npm scripts for app-local and root passthrough execution.
Marked EXP-010e complete in task board.
risks: Latency target is local-machine specific; CI/low-power hardware may need adjusted threshold.
Scenario set is deterministic but not exhaustive for all future agent types.
rollback: Remove eval verification script and scripts entries; keep eval APIs unchanged.
